steps.title: Add a related fact
steps.content: The first sentence says Najas marina can thrive in nickel-polluted soil. The second sentence adds more information about the same plant by explaining that it absorbs and stores nickel.

steps.title: Reject contrast and result links
steps.content: A makes the second sentence sound like a result of the first, while B and D signal contrast. The second sentence instead adds an intensifying related point about how the plant handles nickel. The answer is C.
